new_classes.label_de: Likör in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (KN 2208 70 90)
new_classes.definition_en: Liqueur or cordial as defined under heading 2208 (sweetened spirituous beverage, flavoured with plant extracts or aromatic substances, with added sugar or sweetening matter) presented in containers of a capacity exceeding 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 70 90 (versus its sibling 2208 70 10) are: (1) the product is a liqueur or cordial — captured via subclassing eucn:Liqueur; (2) presented in containers of capacity > 2 L — captured via the someValuesFrom restriction on BFO:has_part pointing to eucn:LargeContainer; (3) bearing sweetening and flavouring qualities — captured via RO:has_quality restrictions on LiqueurSweeteningQuality and AddedFlavouringQuality. A small coverage gap remains because the HS Explanatory Note's detailed definitional criteria for liqueurs/cordials (e.g. minimum alcohol strength thresholds, specific types of flavouring substances such as plants, fruits, or aromatic preparations) cannot be fully formalised without additional quality classes or datatype restrictions that are not currently in the TBox. The disjointness complement restriction against LiqueurInSmallContainer ensures mutual exclusivity with CN 2208 70 10.
